description: Apply all UI adjustments: region card styling, figure icons, harvest hexagon positions, kami shinto icons, war token text, and Amaterasu translation
steps: 1. In src/i18n/es.ts, change 'kami.amaterasu.summary': 'Honor #1' to 'kami.amaterasu.summary': 'Honor a la posicion 1'. Also in src/i18n/en.ts change the same key from 'Honor #1' to 'Honor a la posicion 1'.

2. In src/App.css, find '.region-card{' and change 'transform:translate(-50%,0)' to 'transform:translate(-50%,-38px)'. Also update the :hover rule transform from 'translate(-50%,0) scale(1.05)' to 'translate(-50%,-38px) scale(1.05)'.

3. In src/App.css, change the .region-card background from 'background:linear-gradient(145deg,#d4b896,#c4a882,#b89b72)' to a parchment color with gradient toward bone/ivory, 25% transparency, plus an SVG texture pattern as semi-transparent background. Use something like: background:url("data:image/svg+xml,...parchment-texture-SVG..."),linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(212,184,150,0.75),rgba(196,168,130,0.75),rgba(245,235,220,0.75))
4. In src/App.css, change the .region-card border from 'border:2px solid var(--border-gold)' to 'border:3px solid rgba(218,195,130,0.8)' (light gold, 3px).
5. In src/App.css, change the .region-card padding from 'padding:0.5rem 0.75rem' to 'padding:0.5rem 0.35rem'.

6. In src/App.css, change '.region-forces{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,20px);gap:3px;justify-content:center;margin-top:0.3rem}' to '.region-forces{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:3px;justify-content:center;margin-top:0.3rem;max-width:calc(5 * 23px)}' so figures fill horizontally left-to-right, wrapping after 5 per row.

7. In src/App.css, find '.war-token{color:var(--accent-gold);font-weight:bold;font-size:0.75rem}' and add text-shadow for dark gray border outline: 'text-shadow:-1px -1px 0 #444,1px -1px 0 #444,-1px 1px 0 #444,1px 1px 0 #444'.

8. In src/components/RegionCard.tsx, change all FigureIcon size={14} to size={21} (50% bigger). The FigureIcon component renders BushiIcon, ShintoIcon, FortressIcon, DaimyoIcon, MonsterIcon - change all size={14} occurrences to size={21}.

9. In src/components/GameBoard.tsx, update HARVEST_BADGE_META positions: kyushu x from 190 to 170, nagato x from 360 to 340, kansai x from 870 to 880, edo x from 970 to 960, kanto x from 1320 to 1335, oshu x from 1290 to 1305.
10. In src/App.css, find '.kami-slot-figures{position:absolute;bottom:4px;right:6px;display:flex;gap:4px}' and change bottom from 4px to 54px.

11. In src/components/TemplePanel.tsx, find the shinto torii SVG icons (the <svg> with width='24' height='24' inside kami-slot-figures) and add stroke='white' strokeWidth='1' to give them a white border/outline.
acceptance_criteria: Region cards are moved 38px up via transform:translate(-50%,-38px)
Region card has parchment texture background with 25% transparency and bone/ivory gradient
Region card border is light gold, 3px
Region forces are displayed horizontally with flex-wrap, max 5 per row
War token text has dark gray text-shadow outline
Figure icons are size 21 (50% bigger than 14)
Harvest hexagons are moved: Kyushu -20x, Nagato -20x, Kansai +10x, Edo -10x, Kanto +15x, Oshu +15x
Kami shinto SVG icons have white border/outline
Amaterasu summary text is 'Honor a la posicion 1' in both en.ts and es.ts
verification: Run 'npx vite build' in /projects/sandbox/shoguns-ascent and confirm successful build
findings: All changes applied successfully. npx vite build passes. No test framework to run. The user instruction says 'Honor a la posición 1' (with accent), which is what was implemented in both en.ts and es.ts.
